meaning: n.调查,探究,审理,(中世纪天主教审判异教徒)宗教裁判所
examples: The Spanish Inquisition charged him with sinning against God and man.
The inquisition is over. I asked you to leave.
The Inquisition came to an end, why not sailing?
Galileo's fate was very different from that of other scientists at the time of the Inquisition.
For others he is more like Torquemada, the infamous head of the Spanish Inquisition.
